publish.title: Tangaza Igurishwa
publish.delivery_fee_label: Ishyura ryo ku kugereza mu rugo
publish.delivery_fee_placeholder: Ishyura ryo ku kugereza mu rugo
publish.delivery_notes_label: Ibisobanuro byo ku kugereza mu rugo
publish.delivery_notes_placeholder: Mu rugo muri Kigali, umunsi umwe...
publish.images_hint: Ushobora gushyiraho amashusho menshi. Ushusho wa mbere ni wo uzagaragara nk'ikimenyetso.
publish.payment_message: Igurishwa ryakozwe neza. Igiciro cyo gutangaza: {{amount}} {{currency}}
publish.max_images_error: Gahunda yawe yemera amafoto {{max}} gusa. Kuraho amafoto cyangwa vugurura Ifatabuguzi.
publish.images_hin: Urashobora gupakisha amafoto agera kuri {{max}}. Ifoto ya mbere niyo izaba igaragara imbere.

listings.title: Ibigurishwa
listings.explore_text: Shakisha amazu, ibibanza, ibinyabiziga, n'iyamamaza ry'ubucuruzi mu Rwanda.
listings.no_listings_suggestion: Gerageza guhindura uko ushakisha cyangwa ibyo uyungurura.
listings.subscription_expired: Ifatabuguzi ryawe ryangiye. Bugurure kugira ngo ushobore gushyiraho ibicuruzwa bishya.
listings.subscription_required: Ifatabuguzi bukora burakenewe kugira ngo ushobore gushyiraho ibicuruzwa.

auth.fill_details: Uzuzisha amakuru yawe kugira ngo utangire.

sidebar.promote_text: Kugera ku baguzi benshi n'abakodesha ushyira amafoto meza, imitwe ikomeye, n'amakuru yuzuye yo kuduhuza.
sidebar.partners_text: Dukorana n'abafatanyabikorwa bakunze gukora mu by'ubucuruzi bw'ibibanza,imyubakire, ibinyabiziga, imitako, imyenda, no guteza imbere ubucuruzi.
sidebar.safety_tip_1: Emeza aho kiri, igiciro, n'ubukode mbere y'ishyura.
sidebar.safety_tip_2: Hura ahantu hatekanye iyo urebye umutungo cyangwa imodoka.
sidebar.safety_tip_3: Wirinde kohereza amafaranga mbere y'uko wemeza ko igurishwa ari ukuri.
sidebar.support_text: Ubufasha burahari mu gutangaza no gushyiraho konti

login.welcome_description: Injira kugira ngo ucunge ibyo utangaje, utangaze igicuruzwa, kandi ushakashake amahirwe.
login.title: Injira muri konti yawe

register.create_account_description: Injira kuri uru rubuga rwo gutangaza ibigurishwa, gucunga umutungo wawe cyangwa ibyo utangaje, no guhura n'abaguzi, abakodesha, abacuruzi.
register.post_description: Ongeraho umutungo, imodoka, cyangwa ibyo mu bucuruzi mu minota mike.
register.reach_description: Kuza ikigurishwa cyawe kugira ngo kigere ku bantu benshi.
register.manage_description: Kurikirana ubone amakuru y'ibyo watangaje ahantu hamwe.
register.fill_details: Uzuzisha amakuru yawe kugira ngo utangire.
register.terms_required: Ugomba kwemera amategeko na politiki y'ibanga
register.success_message: Konti yakozwe neza. Ushobora nonaha kwinjira.

admin.admin_description: Genga ibigurishwa, ibyiciro, abakoresha, abafatanyabikorwa, amabanneri, n'ibipimo by'abasura.
admin.main_categories_subtitle: Ibyiciro byo hejuru biboneka ku rubuga
admin.name: Izina
admin.visitor_stats_description: Ibyerekeye imikorere y'abasuye buri munsi n'ukwezi
admin.no_daily_data: Nta makuru y'abasuye buri munsi abonetse.
admin.video_banners_description: Shyiraho kandi ugenga amabanneri ya videwo ku ipaji y'ibigurishwa.
admin.banners_subtitle: Amabanneri akora agaragara ku ipaji y'ibigurishwa.
admin.upload_first_banner: Shyiraho banneri ya videwo ya mbere.
admin.admin_users_description: Kora, hindura, shoboza, kandi uhindure abakoresha b'ubuyobozi.
admin.existing_admins_subtitle: Konti zose z'ubuyobozi ziriho zanditswe hano.
admin.non_admin_users_description: Reba abakoresha basanzwe kandi ubashoboze cyangwa ubahagarike.
admin.search_placeholder: Shakisha ukoresheje izina ry'ukoresha, imeli, cyangwa izina
admin.registered_users_subtitle: Ushobora guhindura gusa imiterere y'umukoresha hano.
admin.no_matching_users: Nta mukoresha usanzwe uhuza n'ibyo ushakisha uhari.

category_modal.add_description: Kora icyiciro gishya cyangwa icyiciro gito.

edit_listing.title: Hindura Igurishwa
edit_listing.error_forbidden: Ubuyobozi bwonyaho nibo bashobora guhindura iri gurishwa.
edit_listing.delivery_notes_placeholder: Kukugera murugo muri Kigali, umunsi umwe...
edit_listing.add_images_hint: Ushobora kongeraho amashusho. Nyuma yo gushyiraho, ushobora guhitamo umwe mu mashusho nk'ushusho nyamukuru.

forgot_password.title: Wibagiwe Ijambobanga
forgot_password.description: Shyiramo imeli yawe kugira ngo tukohereze umurongo wo gusubiramo ijambobanga.

home.main_title: Isoko rya none ryo kugura, kugurisha, no kwamamaza.
home.description: Tangaza ibigurishwa by'imitumba, mamaza ubucuruzi, genga ibishyurwa, kandi uhuze abaguzi n'abagurisha.

profile.manage_account_description: Komeza amakuru yawe akurikiranwe kandi ukarinde konti yawe n'ijambobanga rikomeye.
profile.update_details_description: Hindura izina ryawe ry'ukoresha, izina ryambere, izina ryanyuma, na numero ya terefone.
profile.change_password_description: Rinda konti yawe ushyiraho ijambobanga rikomeye igihe cyose.
profile.stay_secure_description: Imeli yawe irakomeza ikarindwe kandi ntishobora guhindurwa hano.

promo_banner.title: Genga Amashusho ya Videwo
promo_banner.description: Shyiraho amashusho ya videwo yo kwamamaza ku ipaji y'ibigurishwa. Amashusho akora agaragara byikora. Ayadakora agumya kubikwa ariko ntabwo agaragara ku bakoresha.
promo_banner.upload_description: Ongeraho amashusho mashya ya videwo uhereye ku buyobozi.
promo_banner.control_status_description: Kora cyangwa uhingurike amashusho ya videwo igihe icyo ari cyo cyose.
promo_banner.attach_link_description: Ohereza abakoresha ku rubuga rw'urubuga rw'uwamamaza.
promo_banner.create_banner_description: Shyiraho ikwamamaza rishya rya videwo ku ipaji y'ibigurishwa.
promo_banner.video_recommendation: Ibyifuzwa: MP4, nta majwi, irambuye, imiterere ya landscape.
promo_banner.no_banners: Nta kwamamaza kuri videwo kuri ubu.

footer.description: Shakisha inzu, ubutaka, n'amahirwe y'ubucuruzi mu Rwanda. Byoroshye, byihuse, kandi birizewe.

subscription.title: Amahitamo yo Kwiyandikisha
subscription.description: Hitamo gahunda yo gutangaza ibicuruzwa no kwagura ibikorwa byawe.
subscription.hidden_message: Ibyo watangaje byahishwe kubera ko gahunda yawe yarangiye.
subscription.agencies_high_volume: Ku bigo n’abacuruzi bafite ibicuruzwa byinshi
subscription.choose_plan_to_start: Hitamo uburyo wifuza maze utangira kumenyekanisha ibicuruzwa byawe

introduction.title: Intangiriro
introduction.content: Murakaza neza kuri Market Hub. Tubaha agaciro ibanga ryanyu kandi twiyemeje kurinda amakuru yanyu. Aya mabwiriza asobanura uko dukusanya, dukoresha, kandi turinda amakuru anyu mugihe mukoresha urubuga rwacu.

information_collected.title: Amakuru Tukusanya
information_collected.item_1: Amakuru y'irangamuntu (izina, imeri, numero ya terefone)
information_collected.item_4: Amakuru ya tekinike (IP aderesi, ubwoko bwa browseri, amakuru y'igikoresho)

how_we_use.title: Uko Dukoresha Amakuru
how_we_use.item_3: Kubavuza ku birebana na konti cyangwa ibitangazwa byanyu

information_sharing.title: Gusangira Amakuru
information_sharing.content: Ntidukwirakwiza amakuru yanyu. Turashobora gusangira amakuru anyu n'abatanga serivisi badufasha mugikorwa cy'urubuga rwacu, mugihe bahaye icyemezo cyo kubika aya makuru mu ibanga.

data_security.title: Umutekano w'Amakuru
data_security.content: Dushyiraho ingamba zikwiye zo kurinda amakuru yanyu kugirango atagirwaho nabi, arahindurwa, aragaragarizwa, cyangwa aratangazwa. Ndetse n'ibyo, nta buryo bwo kwimura amakuru kuri interineti bukingira 100%.

cookies.title: Kuki
cookies.content: Dukoresha kuki n'ikoranabuhanga nk'iryo mu gukurikirana ibikorwa kurubuga rwacu no kubika amakuru amwe. Urashobora kubwira browseri yawe kwanga kuki zose cyangwa kukumenyesha iyo kuki itumwe itumwe.

your_rights.title: Uburenganzira Bwanyu
your_rights.content: Ukurikije aho uri, ushobora kugira uburenganzira bwo:

contact_us.title: Twandikire
contact_us.content: Niba ubaza ikibazo kijyanye n'aya mabwiriza, twandikire kuri:

acceptance.title: Kwemera Amategeko
acceptance.content: Mukoresha Market Hub, urabaye wemeye kugendera kuri aya mategeko. Niba utemera igice icyo aricyo cyose, ntugomba gukoresha serivisi zacu.

eligibility.title: Ibishobora Kugirango Ukoreshe
eligibility.content: Ugomba kuba ufite byibuze imyaka 18 kugirango ukoreshe urubuga rwacu. Ukoresheje Market Hub, uremeza ko ubu buzira ntakindi.

listings.title: Amabwiriza y'Itangazwa
listings.item_2: Ufite cyangwa uburenganzira bwo kugurisha ikintu/umutungo

user_accounts.title: Konti Z'abakoresha
user_accounts.content: Ushinzwe kubika amakuru ya konti yawe mu ibanga no gukora ibikorwa byose bikorwa kuri konti yawe. Menyesha ako kanya niba hari ukoresha konti yawe utemewe.

prohibited_conduct.title: Ibyo Ubuze gukora
prohibited_conduct.item_3: Kutanga ibitangazwa bitari ibyo, bigomeka, cyangwa bidafite ishingiro
prohibited_conduct.item_4: Guhohotera, kubuza abandi gukoresha, cyangwa kubabaza abandi bakoresha

payments.title: Ishyura n'Ifatabuguzi
payments.content: Amafaranga y'ifatabuguzi arishyurwa hatangiriye buri kwezi cyangwa buri mwaka. Amafaranga yishyuwe ntayasubizwa keretse hatanzwe ubundi. Tufite uburenganzira bwo guhindura ibiciro dukomeje kubamenyesha.

termination.title: Guhagarika Serivisi
termination.content: Turashobora guhagarika konti yawe ako kanya, tutabanje kubaburira, niba hari ibyo mukoze binyuranyije n'aya mategeko cyangwa bibangamira abandi bakoresha cyangwa urubuga rwacu.

disclaimer.title: Inyemezabwo
disclaimer.content: Urubuga rwacu rutangwa 'nk'uko ruri' nta kindi. Ntidushobora kwemeza ko ibitangazwa ari iby'ukuri, byuzuye, cyangwa biherutse. Ntiturihishwa ibyo abakoresha bagurisha cyangwa bagura.

changes.title: Amahinduka y'amategeko
changes.content: Tufite uburenganzira bwo guhindura aya mategeko igihe icyo aricyo cyose. Tuzabamenyesha amahinduka akomeye binyuze kuri imeri cyangwa kurubuga rwacu. Ugukomeza gukoresha urubuga bivuze ko wemeye amahinduka.

contact_us.title: Twandikire
contact_us.content: Niba ubaza ikibazo kijyanye n'aya mategeko, twandikire kuri:

guide.title: Ubuyobozi bw'Umukoresha
guide.subtitle: Ibyose ugomba kumenya kuri Market Hub

getting_started.title: Uko Utangira
getting_started.description: Market Hub ni urubuga rwambere mu Rwanda rwo gushaka no kugurisha ibyubaka, imodoka, n'ibicuruzwa. Ubu buyobozi buzakugirira akamaro.
getting_started.step2: Andika amakuru yawe (izina, imeri, numero ya terefone)

posting_listing.title: Gutangaza Igitangazwa
posting_listing.description: Menya uko ukora ibitangazwa bikurura abaguzi.

dashboard.title: Akazu k'Imikorere
dashboard.description: Kanda ibitangazwa byawe byose hamwe n'ibikorwa kuri konti yawe.

safety.title: Inama z'Umutekano
safety.scam_message: Market Hub ntabwo isaba ijambobanga cyangwa amafaranga hanze y'urubuga. Menyesha ako kanya abakoresha bakekwa.

faq.title: Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa
faq.q1: Igikuruzwa rimara igihe kingana iki ryoherejwe?
faq.a1: Igicuruzwa byemerwa mu minota 15 umaze kwishyura. Abaguzi ba Premium na Business bemerwa ako kanya nyuma yo kwishyura
faq.q2: Nshobora guhindura igicuruzwa cyanjye nyuma yo gutangaza?
faq.a2: Oya! Ntushobora guhindura igicuruzwa wamaze gutangaza. Ariko wasaba ubufasha, bigakorwa
faq.a3: Jya ku rubuga rw'ifatabuguzi uhitamo gahunda ushaka.
faq.q4: Bigenda bite iyo ifatabuguzi ryanjye ryarangiye?
faq.a4: Ibicuruzwa byawe bizahishwa kugeza ifatabuguzi bwawe rivuguruwe.
faq.a5: Kanda 'Hamagara' kuri buri gikuruzwa. Hariho numero z'ucuruza

feedback.title: Tangira Igitekerezo
feedback.subtitle: Dufashe kunoza Market Hub utanga ibitekerezo byawe
feedback.name: Izina Ryose
feedback.subject: Intego
feedback.message_placeholder: Tanga ibitekerezo byawe mu buryo burambuye...
feedback.message_hint: Ibitekerezo byawe bidufasha kunoza Market Hub kuri buri wese
feedback.success_message: Urakoze cyane kubitekerezo byawe! Twabishimiye cyane.
feedback.footer_note: Ibitekerezo byawe ntibyitirirwa keretse utanze amakuru yawe. Dukomeza kubungabunga ibanga ryawe.

chatbot.welcome_message:
👋 Muraho! Ndi umufasha wa Market Hub. Nshobora kugufasha:

• Gutangaza ibitangazwa
• Gahunda z'ubusabirizimu
• Ibisabwa ku mashusho
• Ibiciro n'ishyura
• Ubufasha kuri konti

Ushaka kumenya iki?
chatbot.error_message: Tubabazi, hari ikibazo. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.

report.login_required: Injira muri konti yawe mbere yo kumenyesha
